title: TOYANDONA 12Pcs Christmas Poinsettia Flowers, Artificial Glitter Poinsettia Flowers Home Party Wreath Decorations Christmas Tree Ornaments Party Decoration with Stems and Clips- Rose Red
features: 🎄🌺【Christmas Glitter Poinsettias】The package includes 12 sparkling poinsettia flowers, enough for your Christmas decoration needs. Attach them to your Christmas tree branches and also cover them with sequins to make your tree more attractive and festive.

🎄🌺【Proper Size】They are just the suitable size and lightweight enough to clip onto the boughs of your tree, dress up a garland, finish a bow- tied , around your fireplace or attach them on to your Christmas Eve candle centerpieces

🎄🌺【Xmas Tree Ornaments】The Christmas flowers ornaments are made of flexible and non- breakable material, can be applied to anywhere you want, covered with glitter, which make the tree more attractive and more holiday atmosphere.

🎄🌺【Create Christmas Atmosphere】These Christmas Glitter poinsettias can be used for Christmas tree decorations and ornaments, An additions for decorating garlands, rattans, , crafts, mantle, Xmas tree, floral arrangements, windows, etc.Make your home or party full of festive and shiny feeling.

🎄🌺【Nice Christmas Decorations】Great for your Christmas Tree decoration, House decor, Christmas wreath, Christmas and other Christmas decorations. The poinsettia ornaments also can be applied to holiday party wedding, birthday party, New Year or other festival decoration, they will highlight your party and make you and your guests more to enjoy the festival.
